LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S (AS TRUSTEE FOR OPTION ONE MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2006-2 ASSET-BACKED CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2006-2) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR OPTION ONE MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2006-2  ASSET-BACKED CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2006-2
DECLARATION OF SERGIO GUTIERREZ FILED BY DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, SERGIO

LAW AND MOTION 301, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SERGIO GUTIERREZ'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ HAS NOT SUBMITTED A PROPOSED RESPONSE TO THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION AS REQUIRED BY CCP SECTION 473(B) NOR HAS HE PRESENTED EVIDENCE OF EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. KANE APPARENTLY HAS NOT FILED A MOTION TO VACATE, LET ALONE A PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment;
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Philip T. Kilduff (673.0368) specially appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Sergio Gutierrez (585.2863) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SERGIO GUTIERREZ'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant Gutierrez has not submitted a proposed response to the summary judgment motion as required by CCP section 473(b) nor has he presented evidence of excusable neglect. Kane apparently has not filed a motion to vacate, let alone a proposed responsive pleading. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB/xDC) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR OPTION ONE MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2006-2 ASSET-BACKED CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2006-2 MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
